scripts.middleman:demo: ENABLE_COGNITIVE_LOOP=false ENABLE_SOCIAL_VOICE=false TREASURY_AUTO_FUND_ENABLED=false CIRCUIT_BREAKER_COUNT_SLOW_RESPONSES=false MAGICBLOCK_SESSION_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 AIROTC_DEMO_SKIP_STARTUP_RECOVERY=true ENABLE_TORQUE_EVENTS=true npm --prefix middleman-agent run dev
scripts.demo:ports: sh -c 'for p in 3000 8080 8081; do echo PORT $p; lsof -nP -iTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN || true; done'
scripts.demo:stop: sh -c 'pkill -f "agents/elizaos-agent.*proof/fullPipelineProof.ts" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "agents/elizaos-agent.*index.ts --role" 2>/dev/null || true; for p in 3000 8080 8081; do ids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ids" ]; then kill $ids; fi; done'
scripts.proof:demo:run: npm run proof:demo:prewarm && npm run proof:demo
